programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders. When Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter. But what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.desc: A little boy has a stone up his nose from playing football. A 92-year-old got trapped under her car. And World War II hero Norman, who's 95, has a dangerously low heart rate.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: London's network of frontline trauma hospitals treats critically injured patients. Pedestrian João is crushed by a bus and Lance Corporal Lee's been in a paragliding accident.

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: The team re-open the case on the brutal murder of Janine Downes in Wolverhampton in 1991. Beaten and strangled to death, was Janine the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: and future Amazing Spaces co-presenter! - Max McMurdo, who's making a classroom out of rusting shipping containers. Plus: a mobile cinema.
